name: mirofish
description: MiroFish - 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv sync
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.backend: cd backend && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && uv run python run.py
